title: Fudd goes No. 1, reunites with Bueckers in Dallas
content: Azzi Fudd heads to Dallas as the No. 1 pick in the WNBA draft. Minnesota took Olivia Miles with the No. 2 pick.

title: Valks flip ex-LSU star Johnson to Storm in stunner
content: The Valkyries traded Flau'jae Johnson less than an hour after selecting her with the No. 8 pick, sending the LSU standout to the Seattle Storm for Marta Suarez and a future second-round pick.

title: UCLA's 5 1st-round picks, 6 overall set records
content: National champion UCLA became the first team to have five first-round picks in the WNBA draft -- Lauren Betts, Gabriela Jaquez, Kiki Rice, Angela Dugalic and Gianna Kneepkens -- and six overall, with Charlisse Leger-Walker taken in the second round.

title: ESPN's Vitale announces melanoma diagnosis
content: ESPN Hall of Fame broadcaster Dick Vitale has announced he has melanoma in his lung and liver cavity and will be starting immunotherapy soon.

title: Red Sox ace Crochet hammered for 11 runs, 9 hits
content: Red Sox ace Garrett Crochet was battered by the Twins for 11 runs -- 10 earned -- in 1⅔ innings Monday night.

title: O's manager Albernaz OK after line drive to face
content: Craig Albernaz wasn't seriously hurt by the liner from Orioles second baseman Jeremiah Jackson that struck him in the left cheek during Monday's win over the Diamondbacks.

title: Quick, 40, 3-time Cup champion, plays last game
content: In his final game after nearly two decades in the NHL, goaltender Jonathan Quick, 40, who won the Stanley Cup three times in a decorated career, made 14 saves in the New York Rangers' 3-2 loss to the Florida Panthers on Monday night at Amerant Bank Arena.

title: Ex-Cardinals coach, Titans assistant McGinnis dies
content: Former Tennessee assistant Dave McGinnis, who also served as head coach for the Arizona Cardinals in a decorated career on the NFL sidelines, died at 74 on Monday with his family by his side at Ascension St. Thomas Midtown Hospital, the Titans announced.

title: 🥶 'Drake's seats froze': Raptors lean into buzz
content: The seats underwent a pregame makeover presumably for the rollout of the Canadian rapper's upcoming album, "Iceman."

title: 2026 WNBA draft fits, featuring Flau'jae, Azzi Fudd and more
content: The stars took on WNBA draft night in New York City in their best outfits before hearing their names called.

title: NBA 2026 postseason preview: Matchups, biggest questions and what to know
content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

title: 'He turned into the Black Mamba': Inside Kobe Bryant's 60-point farewell
content: From teammates and opponents to coaches, officials and staff, those who were there remember how Bryant's last game became something no one expected -- and no one will forget.

title: Eagles, A.J. Brown intrigue increases as NFL draft nears
content: The Eagles haven't been highly incentivized to move Brown to this point, in large part due to the financials.

title: Our annual NFL draft prospect skill superlative list: The one player who excels at each trait
content: Strongest arm? Fastest offensive and defensive playmakers? Quickest first step? Let's hand out superlatives for this NFL draft class.

title: College coaches pick 2026 NFL draft sleepers
content: We know the top talent in the draft, but who could surprise in the pros? We asked their college coaches.

title: WWE 'Raw': Match results and analysis ahead of WrestleMania 42
content: Andreas Hale recaps the key moments from the final episode of "Raw" before WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas.

title: NBA coaching carousel: What's next for Milwaukee and every open job?
content: Milwaukee and New Orleans are looking for long-term coaching fits. Here's what lies ahead for each franchise.

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Plum back to Sparks, McBride back to Lynx
content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

title: Are Manchester United back? Leeds' performance suggests they're not
content: Leeds United's win over Manchester United at Old Trafford has left Michael Carrick's side wondering how much better can they get to finish off the Premier League season.

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC's first loss of 2026 knocks them off the top
content: LAFC had been practically perfect in 2026, but the Angelenos first loss of the year cleared room for a new No. 1 in this edition of MLS Power Rankings.

title: 'I don't make it easy': How Rory McIlroy won back-to-back Masters
content: After seeing a six-shot lead erased on Saturday, McIlroy still found a way to secure his second green jacket.﻿

title: Men's college basketball transfer portal: Tracking who's on the move
content: Tracking news and updates for players entering -- and exiting -- the transfer portal for the 2026-27 season.

title: Final 2026 NHL Awards Watch: Kucherov takes the lead for MVP
content: Our panel of PHWA voters identify their finalists for all the awards, with some tight finishes in a few spots.

title: Scheffler 4-1 or shorter to win each of the next four golf majors, McIlroy next
content: Odds for next four golf majors: 2026 PGA Championship, U.S. Open and the Open Championship, 2027 Masters.

title: Top 10 tips to play and win ESPN fantasy women's basketball like the pros
content: Your guide to research, drafting and roster strategy to play (and win) fantasy women's basketball this season.

title: Fury, Joshua and Wilder are back; what's next for the glamour division?
content: The heavyweight division is buzzing again thanks to Tyson Fury calling out Anthony Joshua and Deontay Wilder's return.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern, Barça eye move for Milan's Leão
content: Two of Europe's powerhouses are competing for the signature of AC Milan's Rafael Leão. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Bihar to get new CM as Nitish Kumar likely to resign today | LIVE updates
content: Nitish Kumar, who has been Chief Minister for the past 21 years, is likely to tender his resignation after holding his last Cabinet meeting

title: Meghalaya yields new burrowing reed snake
content: The Calamaria garoensis used to be identified as the Calamaria pavimentata until its identification as a distinct species

title: New Prachand LCH production line inaugurated in Tumakuru
content: The New Helicopter Facility is a state-of-the-art greenfield facility established for the production of Light Utility Helicopter (LUH) and Prachand LCH

title: Development in West Bengal leaves much to be desired | Data
content: Economic indicators lag, with low incomes and weak rural wages dragging down overall development in the poll-bound State; health indicators fare better

title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE updates: Congress alleges TMC vandalised helipad ahead of Rahul's Raiganj rally
content: DMK president and Chief Minister M.K. Stalin turned the tables on AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami by emphasising that, had she been alive, former Chief Minister Jayalalithaa would have opposed issues such as delimitation

title: Dispute between dermatologists, dentists takes a legal turn in Kerala
content: The disagreement is over who is authorised to perform hair transplantation and aesthetic and cosmetic surgeries

title: U.P. hikes minimum wages across categories after Noida unrest
content: The move comes against the backdrop of large-scale protests by factory workers in Noida on Monday (April 13, 2026), when thousands demanded higher wages and better working conditions

title: Kadapa court sentences 20 years imprisonment to accused in POCSO case
content: A Kadapa POCSO court has sentenced Palla Venkata Vidya Kiran, 35, to twenty years’ rigorous imprisonment for attempting to rape a minor girl in 2021

title: Indian democracy will be stronger, vibrant if women quota implemented in 2029: PM Modi
content: In a letter to the women of the country, Mr. Modi also said that with women excelling in several fields, it is only fitting that there is an increase in the participation of women in legislative bodies

title: A long-awaited respite for Bastar village as it gets tap water
content: Narayanpur Collector Namrata Jain said that a water supply system had been set up in the village under the Jal Jeevan Mission

title: Over 5,000 properties acquired in Hyderabad for road widening over the past two decades
content: A total 2,024 properties, accounting for 39% of the total, were acquired on the three Metro Rail corridors, to facilitate laying the railway lines

title: Former Haryana CM Hooda blames low procurement of crop on government’s “arbitrary” new rules
content: Hooda has also issued directives to all Congress MLAs and senior leaders regarding this matter, and instructed them to visit all grain markets daily, summon officials to the site, and confront them with the ground realities

title: Need for law, medicine coordination highlighted at interdisciplinary dialogue in Jodhpur
content: Experts addressing the event called for evolving a safe, transparent and legally robust healthcare system

title: Kerala dental student’s death highlights growing threat of predatory loan apps
content: Investigators say the student had taken a loan of around ₹14,000 from an app and recovery agents had been contacting him repeatedly. They also purportedly directed calls and messages to a college teacher in an attempt to shame the youngster and coerce repayment

title: PM calls for dialogue, cooperation to amend women’s quota law
content: Prime Minister says the Opposition had insisted that the women’s reservation Act must be implemented by 2029, and the government has taken the concerns seriously

title: 11 people killed in the truck-taxi accident in Kalyan
content: The accident occurred around 11 a.m. on the Murbad–Kalyan road on National Highway 61 near Gavli village

title: Delimitation will not affect southern States, says Goyal
content: There will be proportional increase of seats across the country due to delimitation and ‘everybody is back to where they were’, says the Union Minister of Commerce and Industry; he also defends the National Education Policy, says T.N. has failed to reach its ‘true potential’ under DMK govt.

title: Resisting amendment can be more harmful for southern States
content: The BJP’s proposal is to have 50% additional seats in the Lok Sabha, one-third of the new total being reserved for women, nationally and in each State; for instance, Kerala, which at present has 20 seats, will have 30 seats, of which ten will be reserved for women.

title: Owaisi condemns ‘exploitation’ of Muslim vote at campaign rally
content: Sharpens attack on both Mamata and Kabir for ‘grave injustice’ towards Muslims of Bengal and using them as a vote bank

title: SC asks NIA to check the political background of people involved in Malda gherao case
content: ‘This is not an academic exercise. We intend to take this into its logical conclusion,’ Chief Justice of India Surya Kant, heading the Bench, says

title: Kejriwal seeks Justice Sharma’s recusal in excise case; Centre calls plea ‘contemptuous’
content: Former Delhi Chief Minister objects to Justice Swarna Kanta Sharma’s reported attendance at four events organised by Akhil Bharatiya Adhivakta Parishad

title: Three-day parole for ‘Savukku’ Shankar to attend mother’s funeral
content: The parole was sanctioned after a petition was submitted by Mr. Shankar’s counsel on April 13, 2026, stating that the detenu’s mother had passed away on Monday

title: Subhas Chandra Bose: the paradox of a revolutionary’s theory and praxis
content: The leader synthesised Indian spirituality with Hegelian dialectics, evolving from an absolute idealist into a pragmatic revolutionary seeking to build a modern, socialist India — an analysis on Bose’s journey through philosophy, politics, and his plans for society and national regeneration

title: ED arrests I-PAC director in West Bengal coal 'scam' case
content: An official said Chandel was taken into custody under the provisions of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) in Delhi late evening

title: CBI tracks down fugitive in 2014 Kolkata disappearance case to Surat
content: The accused had been living in Surat using fake identity documents in the name of Amit Sharma. The agency produced him before a local court there to get his transit remand to Kolkata.

title: TCS Nashik case: two suspended employees masterminds, say police
content: Tata Sons chairman N. Chandrasekaran announced that a thorough investigation is underway under TCS' Chief Operating Officer Arathi Subramanian to establish the facts and identify individuals responsible for the situation.

title: IMD’s April forecast projects monsoon to be ‘below normal’ for first time in 11 years
content: El Nino conditions are likely after June, the IMD said. Historically, six out of 10 El Nino years have been linked to depressed rainfall over India.

title: If BJP were playing petty politics, Tamil Nadu would not have got first PM Mitra Park, says Piyush Goyal
content: The first such park was sanctioned in Tamil Nadu’s Virudhunagar, and not in any State ruled by the BJP or NDA, says Union Minister for Commerce and Industry

title: A true benevolent authoritarian enforces discipline for the greater good: Seeman
content: Naam Tamilar Katchi chief coordinator Seeman contends that without discipline, there will be no order; he bats for an economy centred on agriculture in T.N. and plans to create government-led industries based on local resources if his party emerges victorious in the Assembly election

title: Grassroots-level SIR drives impacted voter turnout in Kerala, say community forums
content: Volunteers had guided voters through documentation procedures amid widespread concern over disenfranchisement

title: Three held for murder of forest guard who tried to stop sand mafia tractor; two linked to BJP
content: The prime accused’s arrest comes on a day when the Supreme Court slammed the governments Madhya Pradesh and Rajasthan over the rampant illegal sand mining in the National Chambal Gharial Sanctuary and nearby regions

title: T.N. election 2026: Vaniyambadi constituency residents complain about delay in construction of ROB, illegal sand mining on Palar riverbed
content: They said that indiscriminate sand mining has affected the depth of the riverbed and recharge of groundwater

title: Supreme Court expresses ‘shock’ at the impunity of Chambal sand miners
content: The Bench further suggested that a GPS system could be installed in heavy earth-moving machines in the area to keep a track of their movement

title: Inventory of jewels in inner chamber of Jagannath Temple in Puri begins after 48 years
content: Team of goldsmiths, RBI representatives, priests carrying out exercise on orders of the Orissa HC after concerns were raised over safety of jewels

title: Punjab Assembly passes Bill with strict provisions against acts of sacrilege
content: Draft law to ensure swift probe, make offences non-bailable, impose punishment up to life term in prison and fine up to ₹25 lakh, says CM; SGPC calls for effective implementation of legislation

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Slow progress of infrastructure work, unemployment frustrate voters of Mayiladuthurai constituency
content: Be it the ₹83.03-crore underground sewerage project, the ₹29.01-crore Perunthalaivar Kamarajar Bus Stand of the Sarangapani flyover, poor planning and execution remain the common factors; the government hospital in the district headquarters lacks basic facilities

title: T.N. Assembly election: Jayalalithaa would have opposed delimitation if she were alive, says Stalin
content: The Chief Minister reasons she would have taken firm action and opposed issues that deprive T.N. of its rights, as when she opposed GST and NEET. He criticises the present day AIADMK, which is the main Opposition party, for not raising its voice on such issues

title: Resign as PM if you want to be BJP’s face in West Bengal, CM Mamata tells Modi
content: At a public meeting in Siliguri, the Prime Minister had said all BJP candidates contesting the Assembly election were “Modi”; it was a counter to the Chief Minister’s remark that she was the candidate on all 294 seats

title: Locals block highway in J&K after man ‘attacked by cow vigilantes’ goes missing
content: The Jammu and Kashmir Police registered a First Information Report (FIR) at Ramsoo Police Station; four accused have been detained

title: Disruptions in cooking gas, diesel supply continue to affect fisheries sector
content: Around 2,000 engaged in fishing-related work at Thoppumpady harbour hit as deep-sea vessels, including gillnet, longline, and trawl boats, remain idle

title: Supreme Court notice to Centre, Election Commission on plea to bring in iris, biometric verification of voters at polling booths
content: A Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant considers the financial implications of implementing such a mechanism, but says it will consider the plea before the next General Election

title: 20-yr pause of uranium enrichment & Tehran's counter: How US–Iran talks collapsed at the last mile
content: Peace talks between the US and Iran have stalled over uranium enrichment curbs, with Washington proposing a 20-year freeze and Tehran offering five years. Disagreements also arose regarding the scope of a potential deal, including Hormuz and sanctions relief, despite initial hopes for a breakthrough.

title: TCS Nashik row: Undercover op reveals sex abuse, religious pressure; firm vows 'zero tolerance'
content: A tip-off about a Hindu woman observing Ramzan fasts at a TCS Nashik BPO unit triggered a police investigation. Undercover operations led to arrests of seven employees amid allegations of sexual exploitation, religious coercion, and workplace harassment. TCS has suspended employees and launched an internal probe.

title: ‘Watch out for sharks’: Sooryavanshi gets warning after golden duck
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in IPL 2026 with explosive batting. Former pacer Simon Doull warns the young star about management companies prioritizing profit over his long-term career. Doull advises Sooryavanshi to be cautious of external influences and surround himself with people who genuinely care about his development and longevity.

title: 'Will be gross injustice if delayed': PM Modi urges support for women’s reservation bill
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has addressed the women of India, emphasizing "Nari Shakti" and the government's commitment to women's reservation in legislative bodies. He highlighted the upcoming special Parliament session to pass a constitutional amendment for the Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam, aiming for its full implementation by the 2029 elections.

title: Why Anthropic & everyone else 'scared' of the company's latest AI model Mythos are 'wrong'
content: Tech pioneer George Hotz dismisses panic over Anthropic's AI model Mythos, claiming he could find zero-days faster. He argues skilled hackers have better, legal options, making exploits rare due to incentives, not difficulty. Experts agree, noting Mythos's findings were in controlled environments. Smaller, cheaper AI models also demonstrated similar capabilities, questioning the 'watershed moment' claim.

title: Out for golden duck vs SRH, Sooryavanshi 'not happy' with RR's this decision
content: The teen prodigy has been the flavour of this season in the T20 tournament with two 15-ball fifties including in the previous match and key to Rajasthan's four wins.

title: UP govt hikes minimum wages after Noida protests; revised rates effective from April 1
content: Following recent unrest, the Uttar Pradesh government has approved a significant increase in minimum wages for all worker categories, implemented retrospectively from April 1. This decision, approved by the CM, aims to address demands for higher pay and better conditions after large-scale factory worker protests.

title: 'I do make people better': Trump explains why he deleted post depicting him as Jesus
content: Former US President Donald Trump faced backlash for an AI image showing him as a Jesus-like figure. He later explained it was meant to portray him as a doctor healing people. The image, which sparked criticism from supporters and others, was eventually deleted. Trump dismissed the negative reactions as fake news.

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has a message for all American technology companies
content: Google CEO Sundar Pichai urged US tech companies to lead global AI development, emphasizing its profound impact and the need for responsible innovation to benefit all Americans. He highlighted AI's transformative applications in medicine, education, and emergency response, while also acknowledging challenges like workforce disruption and the need for retraining and regulation.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ day 26: Ranveer Singh-starrer beats ‘Jawan’, ‘Stree 2’
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' has achieved remarkable box office success, nearing ₹1,100 crore net in India and ₹1,720 crore gross worldwide after 26 days. The spy drama's impressive fourth-week collection of ₹40.2 crore has positioned it as the 4th highest grosser in that period, surpassing 'Jawan' and 'Stree 2'.

title: Will MS Dhoni play today against KKR? Latest update on CSK keeper's return
content: CSK registered their first victory after an all-round effort against Delhi Capitals. Sanju Samson scored 115 off 56 balls, his first major contribution for the franchise, while the bowlers also did their job.

title: 'Don't forget you work in BJP states': Suvendu Adhikari's warning to migrant workers in Nandigram
content: Opposition leader Suvendu Adhikari warned Muslim migrant workers in Nandigram that they might lose work in BJP-governed states after the assembly polls. He cited the presence of thousands of workers in Gujarat, Maharashtra, and Odisha, all ruled by the BJP. The TMC criticized Adhikari's remarks as threats and intimidation, vowing to report the matter to the Election Commission.

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
content: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: What these UK tourists do to sustain their travel in India will surprise you
content: In Jaisalmer, two UK tourists redefined travel by working four hours daily at a hotel restaurant for free accommodation and food. This unique approach allowed them to deeply immerse themselves in local culture and skills, demonstrating a remarkable mindset towards labor. Their story highlights a refreshing perspective on work, dignity, and exploration, inspiring many.

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
content: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.

title: Mike Vrabel faces backlash amid Dianna Russini hot tub scandal
content: New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel skipped a scheduled media session amid controversy involving Dianna Russini, following photos of them together in Arizona. While both denied any inappropriate relationship, Russini faces an internal review at The Athletic. Fans questioned Vrabel’s absence, calling it evasive, though some believe it was a strategic move to avoid distractions as the team focuses on upcoming draft preparations.

title: Dianna Russini faces backlash after old comments on husband resurface
content: Dianna Russini faces mounting backlash after old podcast comments about her marriage resurfaced amid viral photos with Mike Vrabel. While both deny any wrongdoing, public reaction has blurred the line between personal humor and professional credibility. The Athletic has defended Russini, but an internal review signals the seriousness of the situation as scrutiny continues to grow.

title: 'Had we not acted …': Netanyahu hails 'crushing blow to Iran' as Israel marks Holocaust
content: Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu declared the nation has fulfilled its promise to prevent a second Holocaust, citing military actions against Iranian nuclear sites. He also criticized Europe's "deep moral weakness" and loss of identity. President Herzog urged global leaders to combat rising antisemitism, emphasizing national unity amidst ongoing challenges.

title: Was Noida workers' protest hijacked? 40,000 protesters, arson, bot networks, Pak link under probe
content: Noida witnessed massive industrial worker protests over wages, escalating into widespread violence, arson, and vandalism across multiple sectors. Authorities are investigating potential links to organized misinformation and even Pakistan-backed destabilization attempts, while also flagging a possible Naxal revival.

title: Oil prices fall below $100 as US–Iran signal fresh talks amid Hormuz blockade
content: Oil prices dipped below $100 per barrel as hopes for eased US-Iran dialogue emerged following peace talks in Islamabad. Despite some positive signs, an agreement was not reached, with Iran refusing to abandon nuclear fuel enrichment. The US military extended its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, prompting threats from Iran, though diplomatic channels remain open.

title: 1, W, 0, W, 0, W: Praful's dream IPL debut nurtured by Aaron, McGrath
content: Praful Hinge’s dream IPL debut, where he rattled Rajasthan Royals with four wickets, is a story of resilience and self-belief. After a career-threatening back injury, the Vidarbha pacer found support in Varun Aaron and Glenn McGrath, who guided his comeback. The seamer picked up four wickets on his IPL debut.

title: 12th pass ‘doctor’ held after 30 illegal kidney transplants; poor lured for Rs 5L, organs sold for Rs 1 cr
content: Kanpur police have arrested Rohit Tewari, a Class XII passout, for managing 30 illegal kidney transplants by posing as a doctor. The racket, exposed on March 31, involved luring poor individuals to sell kidneys and selling them to wealthy patients for exorbitant prices. Tewari, who was on the run, has been identified as the mastermind behind the operation.

title: Happy Puthandu: Top 75 Tamil new year wishes, messages, greetings and quotes
content: Puthandu, the Tamil New Year, ushers in a period of hope, prosperity, and new beginnings. Celebrated globally by Tamil communities, it involves home cleaning, festive meals, and temple visits. As Puthandu 2026 approaches on April 14, heartfelt wishes and messages are shared to convey warmth and joy, emphasizing gratitude and cultural pride.

title: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin extracts oxygen from Moon dust in major breakthrough
content: Blue Origin has successfully extracted oxygen from Moon-like soil in lab tests, a significant step for sustained lunar presence. This molten regolith electrolysis technique could drastically cut reliance on Earth supplies. The process, which also yields useful metals for construction, addresses a key challenge for future long-term human missions beyond our planet.

title: Who is Sakib Hussain? Bihar pacer shakes RR on IPL debut; joins Akhtar in elite list
content: Sakib partnered with another SRH debutant Praful Hinge (4/34), as Sunrisers Hyderabad registered a 57-run win in Hyderabad.

title: Second Coming: Trump auditions for role after POTUS
content: US President Donald Trump launched a blistering attack on Pope Leo XIV, calling him "WEAK on Crime" and an Obama sympathizer. Trump posted a messianic image of himself, sparking global backlash. The Pope responded by emphasizing the Gospel's message of peacemaking, while allies and critics debated Trump's actions.

title: Delimitation must be preceded by census: Sonia Gandhi
content: Sonia Gandhi has questioned the Modi government's planned delimitation, arguing it must follow a census and be politically equitable. She emphasized that states pioneering family planning and smaller states should not be disadvantaged. Gandhi also called for an OBC sub-quota for women in reservation, highlighting the need for broader discussions before proceeding with such consequential amendments.

title: Person born in India has right to remain on electoral roll, vote: Supreme Court
content: The Supreme Court observed that a person born in India has a constitutional and sentimental right to be on the electoral roll and vote. The bench indicated it would re-examine election results if victory margins are low and voter deletions are high, particularly in cases involving scrutiny of older voter lists.

title: 'I wanted Sooryavanshi's wicket on first ball': Praful Hinge makes big revelation
content: Praful Hinge made a sensational IPL debut, taking three wickets in his opening over against Rajasthan Royals.  His dream spell dismantled their top order, setting the stage for Sunrisers Hyderabad's victory.  Hinge, who finished with 4/34, dedicated his Player of the Match award to his family, highlighting their sacrifices.

title: Monsoon poor in every 7 out of 10 El Nino years
content: El Niño years since 1980 have frequently coincided with poor Indian summer monsoons, with around 70% experiencing deficient or below-normal rainfall. Latest forecasts indicate a strong El Niño is likely to develop within months, potentially impacting the upcoming monsoon season, which the IMD expects to be below normal.

title: In Hungary, Ambedkar inspires oppressed Roma
content: A school in Hungary, inspired by B.R. Ambedkar, serves as a beacon for the Roma community, mirroring their struggles with oppression. Founded by a sociologist and Roma activist, the school translates Ambedkar's texts and teaches Roma history, fostering empowerment. Graduates are becoming local leaders, and girls' education is improving, reflecting Ambedkar's ideals.

title: 'It’s disturbing': Melanie Collins shredded light on unseen sacrifices of NFL reporters
content: Melanie Collins once revealed in 2021 that constant travel is the most “disturbing” part of her NFL reporting career, after logging over 1.9 million kilometres in flights. Despite the exhaustion, she insists “it’s all worth it.” Collins also advised aspiring journalists to stay adaptable, gain experience, be prepared, and remain authentic in a constantly evolving sports media industry.

title: Amid a looming spectre of El Nino, IMD says monsoon likely to be 'below normal'
content: India's farm sector faces potential challenges as the India Meteorological Department (IMD) predicts a 'below normal' southwest monsoon. Amidst growing El Nino risks, rainfall is forecast at 92% of the long period average, with a higher probability of deficient rains.

title: Iran Slams US Blockade As 'Grave Violation Of Sovereignty'
content: Iran slammed a US blockade around its ports on Monday as a "grave violation" of its sovereignty, as Washington and Tehran's belligerent...

title: US, Iran Weighing New Talks On Thursday, 2 Venues In Consideration: Report
content: According to the report, Islamabad and Geneva are two of the possible locations being discussed for the new round of talks.

title: 'Blood Kick' Horror In Bhopal: Men Inject Own Blood Back Into Their Bodies
content: Repeated self-injection can lead to severe infections, sepsis, HIV, hepatitis, nerve damage, blood clots, anemia, and organ failure, experts warn.

title: Pay Hike Demand, 300 Arrests, Pak Link Under Probe: The Violent Noida Protest
content: Noida protests: Cops said that some "outsiders" attempted to incite the unrest in Noida after workers had dispersed peacefully.

title: Made Lot Of Progress, Ball In Iran's Court: JD Vance On US-Iran Peace Talks
content: US Vice President JD Vance says Iran moved towards the US in Islamabad peace talks but did not go far enough

title: Odisha Woman Gets Husband Killed After He Opposes Her Extra-Marital Affairs
content: Bhubaneswar, April 13 (IANS) In a significant breakthrough, the police on Monday cracked the sensational murder case of a youth who was shot dead in Odisha’s Jajpur district on April 6, arresting five persons, including the deceased’s wife, informed

title: Pakistan Weighs 'All Options' To Repay $3 Billion UAE Loan
content: The country's foreign-exchange reserves stood at $16.4 billion as of March 27, enough to cover close to three months of imports.

title: US-Sanctioned Tanker Linked To China Tests Trump Blockade With Hormuz Transit
content: Rich Starry, a medium-range tanker earlier known as Full Star, was blacklisted by Washington in 2023 for helping Tehran evade energy sanctions.

title: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Second Round Of US-Iran Talks Likely On April 16
content: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE: US President Donald Trump said that Iran "lies" as they had promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but did not.

title: Loan vs Lifestyle: Why Urban Youth Is Living Paycheck-To-Paycheck
content: Across urban India, thousands of young earners are discovering that their salary disappears into EMIs and lifestyle spends long before the month ends.

title: US Wanted 20-Year Freeze On Iran's Nuke Dreams, Tehran Was Ready For 5
content: Tehran has reportedly proposed suspending uranium enrichment for up to five years — an offer the Trump administration rejected, insisting on 20 years

title: Why Trump Gave $100 Tip To Grandma On McDonald's Delivery To White House
content: Sharon Simmons, dressed in a "DoorDash Grandma" T-shirt, walked up to the Oval Office's exterior door to deliver food from McDonald's.

title: Delhi-Dehradun Expressway To Be Launched Today: Route, Travel Time, Features Explained
content: Built at an estimated cost of around Rs 12,000 crore, the Delhi-Dehradun Expressway will begin near the Akshardham Temple in Delhi and end in Dehradun.

title: Mother Of Assam AJP Candidate Files Defamation Complaint Against Himanta Sarma
content: Sujata Gurung Chowdhury files National Commission for Women complaint alleging Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma made false defamatory claims.

title: "He's Very Weak On Crime": Trump Refuses To Apologise To Pope Leo
content: "There's nothing to apologise for. He's wrong," Trump told reporters, a day after a social media post and comments slamming the US-born pope.

title: S Jaishankar Speaks To Kuwait, Singapore Counterparts Amid Middle East Crisis
content: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar on Monday spoke to his counterparts from Kuwait and Singapore, focusing on the West Asia crisis as the US blockade of Iranian ports takes effect.

title: Are Stock Markets, Commodity Markets, Banks Closed Today For Ambedkar Jayanti?
content: Ambedkar Jayanti is observed nationwide to mark the birth anniversary of BR Ambedkar, who played a crucial role in drafting the Indian Constitution.

title: Fantasy baseball news: Baltimore's injuries continue to mount
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the young catcher has started seven of the Kansas City Royals last nine contests and homered three times . his whiff rate is of concern, especially considering he had a 28.3% strikeout rate while with Triple-A Omaha last season .

title: Free agent pickups: Need help at catcher? Here's where to look
content: catchers have posted a collective OPS 33 points lower than the league's average in the category this century . in the past 25 non-shortened seasons, catchers accounted for only 10 of the 625 total seasons with 450-plus fantasy points among hitters . a pair of youngsters have shown enough pop at the plate to poten .

title: Week 9: Top 25 rankings, best moments and what to watch
content: despite being pushed to extra innings, the sport is giving us the best of everything . UCLA isn't relinquishing the top spot yet as the Bruins remain steady at no. 1 . despite winning the series over the Longhorns, Texas A&M rose up eight spots to break into the top 10 for the first time this season .

title: Top 10 WrestleMania moments: From double turns to the end of the streak
content: "Showcase of the Immortals" has a long history of creating moments fans will never forget . we combed through more than 450 matches across 42 WrestleManias to rank the 10 greatest moments . the voting committee fought tooth and nail for tuesday .

title: Fight grades: Nearly every UFC 327 bout exceeds expectations
content: it's no secret that the UFC has been in a slump since the start of 2026 and in dire need of a fight card that could remind fans why it is the best mixed martial arts promotion in the world . there was one lousy fight on the card ( Dominick Reyes vs. Johnny Walker ). it will be largely forgotten thanks to Carlos Ulberg's dramatic knockout of Ji Procházka to capture the light heavyweight championship .

title: Man City revive Premier League race, Inter win seven-goal thriller, more
content: man city beat man city 3-0 at the emirates stadium on sunday . man city now have momentum heading into next weekend's game with arsenal . a ton of talking points to unpack: will we get more twists and turns between now and end of the season?

title: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
content: the 2026 playoffs are set to begin on saturday . the playoff bracket isn't set yet . eight teams from each conference reach the first round and face off in a best-of-seven series to advance .

title: Who should challenge for Carlos Ulberg's championship first?
content: Carlos Ulberg knocked out former champion Ji Procházka in the first round at uFC 327 to claim the title in his 10th consecutive victory . the only problem is that he also appeared to have suffered a leg injury that could put his immediate title defense in jeopardy . here are some possible scenarios for Ulberg and athletes who earned statement wins in Miami .

title: The case for the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's MVP trophy of record
content: Connor McDavid scored a hat trick in a win over San Jose . the Hart Trophy shouldn't be the MVP trophy of record in the NHL . he wants the Lindsay to be considered the top MVP award .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit
content: it has been a busy week of WNBA free agency . it started off when Angel Reese was traded to the Atlanta Dream . the sky finished tied for last in the league at 10-34 . veteran guard Ariel Atkins is headed back to LA .
